metadata.title: DVC + SkyPilot Setup Script Test Suite — Production-Grade Pre-Launch Validation
metadata.priority: P0 — prevents burning cloud credits on FAILED_SETUP jobs
metadata.incident: 8 FAILED_SETUP jobs on GCP = ~$5 wasted. dvc pull -r gcs failed on data/processed/minivess (tracked but never pushed)

plan.problem:
SkyPilot setup scripts are NEVER tested locally before cloud deployment. The 4th pass debug factorial burned ~$5 on 8 FAILED_SETUP jobs because: 1. dvc pull -r gcs pulls ALL DVC-tracked outputs 2. data/processed/minivess is tracked but NOT pushed to GCS 3. DVC returns non-zero exit → set -e kills setup → job fails 4. Each failed job provisioned an L4 spot VM (~$0.60) before failing
Root cause: AI slop implementation — code that "looks right" but was never validated against real infrastructure.

task.title: Test: all unfrozen DVC stages have lock entries
task.description: Parse dvc.yaml for stages with outs:. Parse dvc.lock for committed stages. Any unfrozen stage with outputs but no lock entry = tracked but never pushed. This catches the exact $5 failure at make test-staging time.

task.title: Test: SkyPilot dvc pull paths match dvc.lock outputs
task.description: Parse train_factorial.yaml setup section for dvc pull commands. Extract the paths (e.g., data/raw/minivess). Verify each path appears as an output in a stage that HAS a dvc.lock entry. Catches "setup pulls path X but X was never pushed."

task.title: Implement: DVC sync verification tests
task.description: Implement T1 and T2 using yaml.safe_load() on dvc.yaml and dvc.lock. No cloud credentials needed — pure file parsing.

task.title: Test: setup script has no banned commands
task.description: Parse setup section from train_factorial.yaml. Verify no apt-get, pip install, uv sync, git clone. Already partially covered but extend to check ALL SkyPilot YAMLs in deployment/skypilot/.

task.title: Test: setup dvc pull has error handling
task.description: The dvc pull command must be followed by || { ... exit 1; } or wrapped in set -e. The error message must mention the actual failure (data path), not just "check credentials."

task.title: Test: run section guards against missing prerequisites
task.description: The run section must check for splits.json existence before proceeding. This catches "setup failed silently, run starts anyway."

task.title: Test: preflight script checks Docker image exists
task.description: The preflight script must run docker manifest inspect on the GAR image. Test verifies the check function exists and returns bool.

task.title: Test: preflight script checks required env vars
task.description: HF_TOKEN and MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI must be non-empty in .env.

task.title: Implement: scripts/preflight_gcp.py
task.description: Programmatic pre-launch validation: 1. Docker image exists on GAR (docker manifest inspect) 2. GCS bucket accessible (gsutil ls) 3. DVC data hashes present on GCS 4. Required env vars set (HF_TOKEN, MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI) 5. SkyPilot GCP backend configured (sky check gcp) 6. Checkpoint bucket writable 7. dvc.yaml/dvc.lock consistency (call Module 1 logic)

task.title: Wire: run_factorial.sh calls preflight before launch
task.description: Add preflight check AFTER config parsing, BEFORE launch loop: "${REPO_ROOT}/.venv/bin/python" "${REPO_ROOT}/scripts/preflight_gcp.py" || exit 1 Add SKIP_PREFLIGHT=1 escape hatch for testing.

task.title: Test: DVC raw data hash exists on GCS
task.description: Parse dvc.lock for data/raw/minivess md5 hash. Verify it exists on GCS via gsutil ls. Auto-skip without GCS credentials.

task.title: Verify: make test-staging catches the original failure
task.description: Temporarily revert dvc pull to the broken version (dvc pull -r gcs without path filter). Verify that test_skypilot_dvc_pull_paths_match catches it. Then revert.

task.title: Verify: preflight_gcp.py runs successfully locally
task.description: uv run python scripts/preflight_gcp.py — should pass all checks (Docker image on GAR, GCS accessible, DVC data present).

task.title: Verify: run_factorial.sh --dry-run includes preflight
task.description: ./scripts/run_factorial.sh --dry-run configs/factorial/debug.yaml must show preflight checks passing before listing jobs.

test-tier-mapping.tier: No cloud credentials. Pure file parsing + static analysis. Catches: tracked-but-not-pushed, banned commands, missing guards.
Requires Docker. Runs setup script in container locally. Catches: setup script runtime failures.
Requires GCS ADC credentials. Auto-skips without them. Catches: data not on GCS, permissions issues.
Run before sky jobs launch. Called by run_factorial.sh. Catches: ALL of the above at launch time.

what-this-would-have-caught.failure: dvc pull -r gcs fails on data/processed/minivess (tracked but not pushed). Caught by: T1 (staging), T2 (staging), T10 (preflight), T12 (cloud).
DVC partial pull + cp same-file error in 1st pass. Caught by: T2 (setup paths match lock), T5 (error handling).
